notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, third baseman Coby Mayo to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, third baseman Coby Mayo to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a double play, first baseman Pete Alonso to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Michael Massey out at 2nd. Jac Caglianone out at 1st.
